meaning: n.英国产强性黑啤酒之一种,其商标名
examples: Diageo's brands include Smirnoff vodka, Johnnie Walker Scotch whiskey, and Guinness stout.
On April 12, 2016, Xinhua Dictionary got two Guinness World Records—the most popular dictionary and the best-selling book.
Guinness World Records confirmed on October 9, 2010 that a gigantic pumpkin grown in Wisconcin was officially the world's heaviest.
In fact, the Guinness Draught we know today is likely a smoother, less robust version of the original.
